title: Solana Token Holders Snapshot
description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{mint}/token_holders/?page-size=100` to retrieve a ranked list of every wallet holding a given SPL token — returns wallet address, raw balance, USD value, and percentage of total supply for each holder. Paginate through all pages for a complete holder distribution. Use for airdrop snapshot lists, DAO governance voter registries, whale identification, or as input to a holder concentration risk score.
